title: rubus royenii
intro: Rubus royenii, also known as the Royal Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit bacterial growth and act as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Rubus royenii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus royenii typically involve making teas, tinctures, or infusions from the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
